["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [309, 673, 834, 775], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "DesnoGuns comes with a custom user interface for each weapon and an advanced weapon system including things like ammunations and unique crafting recipes for each weapon. AK47s, rocket launchers, grenades and glocks are just few of the existing guns in what today is the most advanced weapons mod for Minecraft PE. More than 40 weapons are included in the mod.", "resource-id": "com.juthasoftwork.app.gumodup2:id/textView2", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [309, 775, 1440, 1111], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.RelativeLayout", "bounds": [0, 1115, 1440, 1459], "clickable": true, "children": [{"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "resource-id": "com.juthasoftwork.app.gumodup2:id/imageView1", "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.ImageView", "bounds": [53, 1176, 274, 1397], "componentLabel": "Image"}, {"text": "Black Ops Weapon Mod", "resource-id": "com.juthasoftwork.app.gumodup2:id/textView1", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [309, 1115, 1120, 1217], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "This is an addon for the popular DesnoGuns weapons mod. If you\u2019ve ever played Call of Duty: Black Ops 3, it\u2019s highly likely you\u2019ll recognize the look and names of the weapons included as they are all based on the weapons in that game. If you like science fiction then these weapons will definitely interest you.", "resource-id": "com.juthasoftwork.app.gumodup2:id/textView2", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [309, 1217, 1440, 1459], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.RelativeLayout", "bounds": [0, 1463, 1440, 1807], "clickable": true, "children": [{"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "resource-id": "com.juthasoftwork.app.gumodup2:id/imageView1", "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.ImageView", "bounds": [53, 1524, 274, 1745], "componentLabel": "Image"}, {"text": "DubStep Gun Mod", "resource-id": "com.juthasoftwork.app.gumodup2:id/textView1", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [309, 1463, 930, 1565], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Are you a fan of dubstep and enjoy explosive guns?
